name: productivity
tagline: ClawHub (69★): Plan, focus, and complete work with energy management, time blocking, goals, projects, tasks, habits, reviews, priorities, a
verdict: Strong functionally, quality and security both clean, held back only by hygiene slips: the frontmatter name itself isn't valid kebab-case, and it stays silent on what happens if a write fails or a referenced template file is missing.

highlights.summary: Name is capitalized (not kebab-case: ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$); directory/slug is 'productivity' but the frontmatter name field itself fails the pattern.
Missing-directory and version-migration cases are handled, but write-permission failures and missing referenced files (memory-template.md, situations/*.md) are never addressed.
